title: Moving your stoploss
author: morriase
selftext:
Yesterday I let my algo place a buy trade on gold. I normally run it on a larger account, but this time I tested it on my $100 challenger account with a 0.01 lot size.
If I hadn’t moved the stop loss to lock in profits, I would’ve wiped out 67% of the account. That’s with just 0.01.
I honestly don’t understand how people trade gold on small accounts — the risk management is brutal. Maybe a cent account is the only practical way to do it.
